subject: Fw: cost saving, Bell 407 hanger
body:
tell cecil he is using us to pay his lease.otherwise negotiate a deal for both heli's . and half the office space. , in essence we will split the lease with him,, but only after cecil checks on the whole lease , and whether or not he is up to date on rent


----- Forwarded Message ----
From: "LVJET@aol.com" <LVJET@aol.com>
To: JEEPROJECT@YAHOO.COM
Cc: DKIESQ@aol.com; rkahn@nysgmail.com
Sent: Sunday, June 15, 2008 12:21:34 PM
Subject: cost saving, Bell 407 hanger

Jeffrey,
Stuart Diamond owner of Four Star told Nicolas on Friday that he signed a 4 year lease with Port Authority for his hanger. Nicolas and I negotiated a lower price to store the Bell 407 at Four Star's hanger, for $1,100 per month (on a month to month basis) this includes half of the office space inside the hanger for our use, I would like to make the change July 1st. Currently St.Thomas jet center is charging us $2,200.00 per month. 
We also have the option to store the S76 also if you decide to bring it to LSJ.
I would like your approval in case we are still in pursuit of acquiring the lease.
Emad should have hanger pricing on Monday for a 90' X 60' hanger that can fit in front of current office at Executjet, I will fax you hanger drawing. We may have room to extend to 120 feet in length to edge of Fire dept. building. 
is this approved?
Larry V




________________________________
Vote for your city's best dining and nightlife. City's Best 2008.
